# Minimal Style — Word Template Specs

## Typography
- Heading font: Arial (fallback for Helvetica Neue)
- Body font: Arial
- Title: 28pt, color #1A1A1A, light weight
- Heading 1: 20pt, color #1A1A1A, regular weight
- Heading 2: 15pt, color #333333, regular weight
- Heading 3: 12pt, color #333333, bold
- Body: 11pt, color #333333
- Line spacing: 1.3

## Colors
- Primary: #1A1A1A (near black)
- Accent: #666666 (medium gray)
- Light accent: #F5F5F5 (very light gray)
- Text: #333333
- Border: #E0E0E0

## Heading Style
- Thin horizontal rule (0.5pt #E0E0E0) below H1
- No colored borders or backgrounds
- Extra space: 30pt before H1, 20pt before H2
- Space after: 10pt all levels
- Clean, modern look — emphasis through whitespace

## Table Style
- Header row: no background, bold text only
- Top and bottom borders only (no vertical lines)
- Border: 1pt #1A1A1A (top/bottom), 0.5pt #E0E0E0 (between rows)
- Cell padding: 100 DXA top/bottom, 120 DXA left/right
- Extra spacing between rows

## Header / Footer
- Header: None (clean top)
- Footer: Page number centered, small (8pt, #999999)
- No separator lines

## Page Setup
- A4 (8.27" × 11.69")
- Margins: 1.2" left/right, 1" top/bottom (extra horizontal margins for openness)
- Content width: 5.87" (8,452 DXA)

## Special Features
- Pull quotes: Large italic text, centered, thin top/bottom rules
- Emphasis through size and whitespace, not color
- No bold in body text unless critical
